sections.paragraph:
ἰσχυρός, ά, όν [ἰσχύω]

—1. ‘highly capable for special exertion or activity’, of living beings: strong, powerful Mt 3:11; 12:29; Mk 3:27; Lk 11:21; Hb 11:34; Rv 5:2; 18:21. Also nt. 1 Cor 1:27.

—2. ‘high on a scale of extent as respects strength or impact’, of things: strong Mt 14:30; severe Lk 15:14; impressive 2 Cor 10:10; loud Hb 5:7; Rv 18:2; 19:6; mighty, impregnable 18:10; ponderous vs. 21 v.l. ἰ. παράκλησις strong/great encouragement Hb 6:18.
